message.content:
@startuml
title PB-749 UC4 - Update a Banner on System Management

participant "System Management" as SM
participant "Core Next" as CN
participant "Next Database" as DB
participant "Core Bradesco" as CB

SM ..-- CN
SM ..-- DB
SM ..-- CB

SM -> CN : 1 PUT /v1/notification/banner/{bannerID}

note right of SM
System Management will call this new endpoint passing all the fields necessary to update an existing Banner. The fields are:
1. BANNER_ID
2. BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE_ID
3. TEMPLATE_HEADER
4. TEMPLATE_BODY
5. ENABLE_IND
note right of SM
This use case will be responsible to update an existing banner on Next.
This endpoint is not responsible for deleting a record. To do this, it must use the use case 5 - Delete a Banner on System Management.
However, in this use case, SM may enable or disable Banner.
note right of SM
Note to developers
Core Next will check if exists any Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE on BANNER table.
We can only have one enabled Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE. For this rule, we should disregard the records that are with DELETE_FLG enabled and the Card itself.
note right of SM
If exists any Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE passed by App,
we will throw back an error to App side.
note right of SM
If the defensive checks pass, then we will update the register on BANNER table.
note right of SM
If the Banner don't exists on BANNER table, then we will throw back an error to SM.
HTTP code: 404
note right of SM
Note to developers
